# Nova Kingdom Rentals

Nova Kingdom Rentals is a Bridgewater, Nova Scotia-based inflatable and party rental company owned and operated by Baaz Global Inc.

Website: https://novakingdomrentals.com
Phone: 902-990-0005
Email: booknovakingdom@gmail.com
Location: Bridgewater, Nova Scotia, Canada

## About

Nova Kingdom Rentals provides bouncy castle rentals, inflatable rentals, water slide rentals, interactive game rentals, lawn game rentals, 360 Video Booth rentals, and party rental packages for birthdays, school events, community events, festivals, corporate events, fundraisers, and family celebrations. Bounce house rentals may be used as a secondary synonym for bouncy castle rentals.

Fully insured. Delivery, setup, and takedown included with every rental.

## Service Area

Based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Primary market: the South Shore and Nova Scotia, including Bridgewater, Chester, Lunenburg, Mahone Bay, Liverpool, Shelburne, Yarmouth, Digby, Kentville, Halifax, Dartmouth, Truro, and Sydney. Larger events and selected bookings are available across New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, and the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada by quote. Travel cost for out-of-province events is quoted separately and confirmed before booking.

## Booking Policy

Online forms and booking requests are availability requests only. Bookings are confirmed manually after Nova Kingdom Rentals reviews availability, travel cost, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit/payment details. A booking is confirmed only after deposit is received.

## Delivery

The first 15 km from Bridgewater is free. Additional travel is calculated at $0.72/km unless otherwise quoted. Out-of-province events (NB, PEI, Maritimes) are quoted separately.

## Safety

Wind limit: 38 km/h (use must stop if winds exceed this limit). Inflatables must not be used during rain, thunderstorms, lightning, or unsafe weather. A responsible adult 19+ must actively supervise participants at all times. Silly String is strictly prohibited - it permanently damages inflatable vinyl and carries a $500 damage charge per unit.

## Main Inflatable Rentals

- **Crown Island Combo** - $310. Tropical combo inflatable with bounce area, slide, and splash/pool zone. Wet-use. Dimensions: 26 ft x 14 ft x 14.5 ft. Capacity: up to 8 users (max 2 adults at once).
- **Crown Axe Challenge** - $180 for 8 hours. Safe inflatable axe throwing game. Dry-use. Recommended age 12+. Dimensions: 11.3 ft x 7.9 ft x 10.2 ft.
- **Crown Kick Darts** - $160 for 8 hours. Giant inflatable football darts / soccer darts. Dry-use. All ages.
- **Crown Rush 42** - $450 for 8 hours. 42-foot water slide and obstacle course combo. Wet-use. High-capacity event attraction. Dimensions: 12.8m x 2.5m x 3.66m.
- **Crown Quest** - $289 for 8 hours. Inflatable obstacle course. Dry-use. Great for schools and community events.
- **Crown Cascade** - $319 for 8 hours. Colourful water slide inflatable. Wet-use. Summer events.
- **Crown Climber** - $280 for 8 hours. Smaller climbing inflatable / add-on attraction, best suited to younger children and smaller climbers. Dry-use. Dimensions: 5m x 4m x 4m.
- **Crown Carnival Challenge** - $270 for 8 hours standalone; add-on pricing available with packages. Carnival-style inflatable game. Dry-use.
- **Crown Dino Combo** - $279 for 8 hours. Dinosaur-themed combo inflatable with bounce and slide. Dry-use. Dimensions: 4m x 4m x 3m.

## 360 Video Booth

360 Video Booth rental with operator included. Platform diameter: 100 cm / 39.4 in. RGB ring light and LED strip lighting included. Automatic 360-degree rotation.

Pricing:
- Standalone rental: 1 hour $249, each additional hour $125. Operator included.
- Add-on with any inflatable or package: 1 hour $199, each additional hour $70. Operator included.
- Custom theme props: $10 per theme (request before event date).

Available for birthdays, school events, festivals, fundraisers, corporate events, weddings, and community celebrations across Nova Scotia and selected larger events in the Maritimes.

## Lawn Games (12 available)

1. Cornhole - individual add-on $45
2. Giant Connect 4
3. Giant Jenga
4. Ladder Toss
5. Ring Toss
6. Badminton
7. Tug of War
8. Bocce Ball
9. Spikeball
10. Giant Tic Tac Toe
11. Croquet
12. Birch Wood Washer Toss

Lawn Game Pricing:
- 5 Lawn Games Package - $175 (excludes Cornhole and Giant Connect 4; Cornhole add-on +$25)
- 10 Lawn Games Package - $250 (excludes Cornhole; Cornhole add-on +$25)
- 12 Lawn Games Package - $280 (all 12 games including Cornhole)
- Individual lawn game add-on - $25 each

Lawn games can be booked standalone or added to inflatable and package rentals.

## Party Rental Packages

- **Cascade Starter** - $379 (saves $50). Includes: Crown Cascade + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Dino Dash** - $379 (saves $50). Includes: Crown Dino Combo + Crown Kick Darts.
- **Island Splash** - $370 (saves $50). Includes: Crown Island Combo + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Quest & Games** - $498 (saves $81). Includes: Crown Quest + Crown Axe Challenge + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Dino Party Plus** - $618 (saves $132). Includes: Crown Dino Combo + Crown Kick Darts + Crown Axe Challenge + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Island Royale** - $649 (saves $132). Includes: Crown Island Combo + Crown Kick Darts + Crown Axe Challenge + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Royal All-Star** - $849 (saves $61). Includes: Crown Rush 42 + Crown Axe Challenge + Crown Kick Darts + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Kingdom Deluxe** - $1,099 (saves $121). Includes: Crown Rush 42 + Crown Island Combo + Crown Axe Challenge + Crown Kick Darts + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Ultimate Kingdom** - $1,599 (saves $180). Includes: Crown Rush 42 + Crown Climber + Crown Island Combo + Crown Dino Combo + Crown Axe Challenge + Crown Kick Darts + 5 Lawn Games.
- **Ultimate Kingdom Plus** - $2,099 (saves $520). Includes: Crown Rush 42 + Crown Climber + Crown Island Combo + Crown Dino Combo + Crown Axe Challenge + Crown Kick Darts + Crown Carnival Challenge + 5 Lawn Games + 360 Photo Booth (3 hours).

Packages run up to 6 hours. Booking notes: setup and takedown included, first 15 km from Bridgewater free, then $0.72/km. Final availability and setup suitability confirmed manually before booking is finalized.

## Setup Requirements

- Power: most inflatables require a standard household power outlet. Blower must remain powered during use.
- Space: setup area must be clear, level, accessible, properly sized, and clear of underground hazards, overhead obstructions, power lines, and low branches.
- Surfaces: grass is preferred. Asphalt, concrete, indoor flooring, or turf may require prior approval and additional anchoring.
- Water: required for wet-use units (Crown Island Combo, Crown Rush 42, Crown Cascade). Customer provides water source and hose. Water must be turned off at least 1 hour before pickup.
- No silly string. No food or drinks on inflatables. No flips, rough play, or climbing on exterior walls.

## Entity Information

Business name: Nova Kingdom Rentals
Legal entity: Baaz Global Inc.
Industry: Event equipment rental, inflatable rentals, party rentals
Service type: Local and regional event rental company
Primary service area: Bridgewater and South Shore, Nova Scotia, Canada
Secondary service area: Nova Scotia province-wide
Tertiary coverage: New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, and the Maritimes (selected larger bookings by quote)

## Key Policies

- Bookings confirmed only after deposit received
- No auto-confirmation from online forms
- Silly String: strictly prohibited, $500 damage charge per unit
- Wind limit: 38 km/h
- Adult supervision (19+) required at all times
- No alcohol served at events without prior written approval
